name: OSIA Shared Stash Writer
description: Appends a synthesized intelligence report to the shared OSIA stash file for cross-desk collaboration.
author: OSIA

examples.prompt: Save this report to the shared stash: The target IP 8.8.8.8 belongs to Google.
examples.call: {"report": "The target IP 8.8.8.8 belongs to Google and is primarily used for public DNS."}

report.description: The intelligence summary or data to append to the stash.
